name: Canada
intro: Canada's project market rewards credentials with unusual consistency: regulated industries — banking, energy, public sector — dominate hiring, immigration brings a steady stream of internationally trained professionals who use certification to localise their experience, and employers from Toronto's banks to Alberta's energy firms write PMP directly into job postings. Scrum credentials carry the technology corridors of Toronto, Vancouver and Montreal. There are live online batches all year for Canada — pick a Saturday–Sunday weekend or a Wednesday–Thursday weekday cohort — each timed to fall within normal Canada working-day hours; the schedule below gives the precise local start and end for every date. The package is identical either way: live instruction, exam application support, mock exams, and trainer access until you certify.

faq.q: How much does certification training cost in Canada?
faq.a: The course fee is US$1,295 for PMP and US$695 for CSM, covering the full live online weekend workshop, study materials, mock exams and exam application support. PMI's PMP exam fee (US$425 member / US$675 non-member) is paid separately to PMI; the CSM exam is included in the course fee.

faq.q: Are the classes live or recorded?
faq.a: Every batch is taught live by an instructor over two weekend days — not pre-recorded videos. You can ask questions in real time, work through exercises with the cohort, and reach the trainer afterwards for doubts.

faq.q: Is the certification recognised by employers in Canada?
faq.a: Yes. PMP (from PMI) and CSM (from Scrum Alliance) are global credentials recognised identically everywhere, including by employers and recruiters across Canada.
